name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes - 9 Jan 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Hello, Maropostians!! In the upcoming release, we are introducing a new add-on to our SMS campaigns. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To know more about this feature, kindly read ahead!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We are now supporting Suppression lists for our SMS campaigns. Now marketers can add contacts to these lists so they cannot receive SMS campaigns that you send from your account. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/suppress2.0685g00000Jf6TxAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/suppress2.0685g00000Jf6TxAAJ.png","name":"suppress2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1642,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This will also help you to send the campaign to the correct audiences within that list while suppressing the unwanted ones."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about creating SMS campaigns and the functions of the Suppression list, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-SMS-Campaigns","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Campaigns","bold":true}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Suppression-Do-Not-Mail-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Suppression (Do Not Mail) Lists","bold":true}]},{"text":" pages."}]}]
